name: Full Kannada Cross-Domain Session
description: Voice session: food + grocery + dineout in Kannada
input_text: Meghana's biryani order maaDu, Harpic nu add maaDu, Saturday ge table book maaDu
normalized: Meghana's biryani order do, Harpic also add do, Saturday for table book do

confirmation_prompt.kn: Meghana's biryani Rs 350, Instamart inda Harpic Rs 189, Saturday 8 PM ge table. Total Rs 539. Confirm maaDla?

fallback_scenario.prompt_kn: Meghana's close aagide. Nandhana Palace inda similar biryani ide. Order maaDla?
